              "      async function convertToInteractive(key) {\n",
              "        const element = document.querySelector('#df-4d53c420-5174-4ad9-b5bb-003bec643a43');\n",
              "        const dataTable =\n",
              "          await google.colab.kernel.invokeFunction('convertToInteractive',\n",
              "                                                    [key], {});\n",
              "        if (!dataTable) return;\n",
              "\n",
              "        const docLinkHtml = 'Like what you see? Visit the ' +\n",
              "          '<a target=\"_blank\" href=https://colab.research.google.com/notebooks/data_table.ipynb>data table notebook</a>'\n",
              "          + ' to learn more about interactive tables.';\n",
              "        element.innerHTML = '';\n",
              "        dataTable['output_type'] = 'display_data';\n",
              "        await google.colab.output.renderOutput(dataTable, element);\n",
              "        const docLink = document.createElement('div');\n",
              "        docLink.innerHTML = docLinkHtml;\n",
              "        element.appendChild(docLink);\n",
              "      }\n",
              "    </script>\n",
              "  </div>\n",

      "source": [
        "#fixing the skewed distributions\n",
        "from scipy.stats import boxcox\n",
        "\n",
        "# List of skewed features\n",
        "cols_to_transform = ['Annual Income', 'Health Score', 'Premium Amount', 'Previous Claims']\n",
        "\n",
        "# Apply Box-Cox and store in new columns\n",
        "for col in cols_to_transform:\n",
        "    transformed_data, _ = boxcox(df[col].dropna() + 1)\n",
        "    df.loc[df[col].dropna().index, f'{col} Boxcox'] = transformed_data\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Plot comparison\n",
        "    fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(12, 5))\n",
        "\n",
        "    sns.histplot(df[col], kde=True, ax=axes[0])\n",
        "    axes[0].set_title(f\"{col} - Before Box-Cox\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    sns.histplot(df[f'{col} Boxcox'], kde=True, ax=axes[1])\n",
        "    axes[1].set_title(f\"{col} - After Box-Cox\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "    plt.show()"
      ]
    },

              "      async function convertToInteractive(key) {\n",
              "        const element = document.querySelector('#df-16d6dc8b-1b91-4430-89d4-8c5df5981046');\n",
              "        const dataTable =\n",
              "          await google.colab.kernel.invokeFunction('convertToInteractive',\n",
              "                                                    [key], {});\n",
              "        if (!dataTable) return;\n",
              "\n",
              "        const docLinkHtml = 'Like what you see? Visit the ' +\n",
              "          '<a target=\"_blank\" href=https://colab.research.google.com/notebooks/data_table.ipynb>data table notebook</a>'\n",
              "          + ' to learn more about interactive tables.';\n",
              "        element.innerHTML = '';\n",
              "        dataTable['output_type'] = 'display_data';\n",
              "        await google.colab.output.renderOutput(dataTable, element);\n",
              "        const docLink = document.createElement('div');\n",
              "        docLink.innerHTML = docLinkHtml;\n",
              "        element.appendChild(docLink);\n",
              "      }\n",
              "    </script>\n",

        "from sklearn.tree import DecisionTreeRegressor\n",

        "from sklearn.model_selection import GridSearchCV"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {
        "id": "73nekANex-CX"
      },
      "source": [
        "Decision Tree"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": null,
      "metadata": {
        "id": "s4pCiTgFw9D6"
      },
      "outputs": [],
      "source": [
        "param_grid = {\n",
        "    'n_estimators': [50, 100],\n",
        "    'max_depth': [5, 10],\n",
        "    'min_samples_split': [2, 5]\n",
        "}\n",
        "\n",
        "grid_search = GridSearchCV(DecisionTreeRegressor(), param_grid, cv=3, scoring='r2', n_jobs=-1)\n",
        "grid_search.fit(X_train, y_train)\n",
        "\n",
        "best_model = grid_search.best_estimator_\n",
        "y_pred_best = best_model.predict(X_test)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\nTuned Decision Tree:\")\n",
        "print(\"MAE:\", mean_absolute_error(y_test, y_pred_best))\n",
        "print(\"MSE:\", mean_squared_error(y_test, y_pred_best))\n",
        "print(\"R²:\", r2_score(y_test, y_pred_best))\n",
        "print(\"Best Params:\", grid_search.best_params_)"
      ]
    },

        "param_grid = {\n",
        "    'n_estimators': [50, 100],\n",
        "    'max_depth': [5, 10],\n",
        "    'min_samples_split': [2, 5]\n",
        "}\n",
        "\n",
        "rf_grid = GridSearchCV(RandomForestRegressor(), rf_param_grid, cv=3, scoring='r2', n_jobs=-1)\n",
        "rf_grid.fit(X_train, y_train)\n",
        "y_pred_rf = rf_grid.predict(X_test)\n",
        "\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\nTuned Random Forest:\")\n",
        "print(\"MAE:\", mean_absolute_error(y_test, y_pred_rf))\n",
        "print(\"MSE:\", mean_squared_error(y_test, y_pred_rf))\n",
        "print(\"R^2:\", r2_score(y_test, y_pred_rf))\n",
        "print(\"Best Params:\", rf_grid.best_params_)"
      ]
    },

      "cell_type": "code",

        "svr_param_grid = {\n",
        "    'C': [0.1, 1, 10],\n",
        "    'epsilon': [0.1, 0.5, 1],\n",
        "    'kernel': ['linear', 'rbf']\n",
        "}\n",
        "svr_grid = GridSearchCV(SVR(), svr_param_grid, cv=3, scoring='r2', n_jobs=-1)\n",
        "svr_grid.fit(X_train, y_train)\n",
        "y_pred_svr = svr_grid.predict(X_test)\n",
        "print(\"\\nTuned SVR:\")\n",
        "print(\"MAE:\", mean_absolute_error(y_test, y_pred_svr))\n",
        "print(\"MSE:\", mean_squared_error(y_test, y_pred_svr))\n",
        "print(\"R^2:\", r2_score(y_test, y_pred_svr))\n",
        "print(\"Best Params:\", svr_grid.best_params_)"
      ]
